case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. PATRICK WHITE CHAGNON ET AL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 63481590) AS TO DEFENDANT CHAGNON, PATRICK WHITE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAGNON, PATRICK WHITE $1,819.95 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,078.90, SEE SCANNED DOC
